recipe.title: Roasted salmon & veg traybake
recipe.description: A beautiful salmon traybake recipe – a beautiful seasonal favourite that all comes together in one tray.

ingredients.name: 120g salmon fillets
ingredients.note: skin on, scaled, pin-boned, from sustainable sources

ingredients.name: ½ a small clove of garlic

steps.descr: Scrub the potatoes clean, halving any larger ones, then...
steps.instructions: Scrub the potatoes clean, halving any larger ones, then cook in a pan of boiling salted water over a medium-high heat for 10 to 12 minutes, or until cooked through.

on_enter.say: Scrub the potatoes clean, halving any larger ones, then cook in a pan of boiling salted water over a medium-high heat for 10 to 12 minutes, or until cooked through.

steps.descr: Trim the green beans and add to the pan for the final 2...
steps.instructions: Trim the green beans and add to the pan for the final 2 minutes. Pick the basil leaves.

on_enter.say: Trim the green beans and add to the pan for the final 2 minutes. Pick the basil leaves.

steps.descr: Drain the veg and tip into a large bowl
steps.instructions: Drain the veg and tip into a large bowl. Halve and add the tomatoes, then destone and add the olives along with half the basil leaves.

on_enter.say: Drain the veg and tip into a large bowl. Halve and add the tomatoes, then destone and add the olives along with half the basil leaves.

steps.descr: Add ½ a tablespoon of olive oil, toss together and tip...
steps.instructions: Add ½ a tablespoon of olive oil, toss together and tip into a roasting tray. Shake into an even layer and season with sea salt and black pepper.

on_enter.say: Add ½ a tablespoon of olive oil, toss together and tip into a roasting tray. Shake into an even layer and season with sea salt and black pepper.

steps.descr: Place the salmon fillets into the bowl, add ½ a...
steps.instructions: Place the salmon fillets into the bowl, add ½ a tablespoon of olive oil, and squeeze in the juice of ½ a lemon. Season lightly and toss to coat.

on_enter.say: Place the salmon fillets into the bowl, add ½ a tablespoon of olive oil, and squeeze in the juice of ½ a lemon. Season lightly and toss to coat.

steps.descr: Lay the salmon fillets on top of the vegetables,...
steps.instructions: Lay the salmon fillets on top of the vegetables, skin-side up. Slice off 4 rounds of lemon and lay on top of the fillets, then roast for 10 minutes, or until cooked through.

on_enter.say: Lay the salmon fillets on top of the vegetables, skin-side up. Slice off 4 rounds of lemon and lay on top of the fillets, then roast for 10 minutes, or until cooked through.

steps.descr: To make the basil & mustard yoghurt, bash the remaining...
steps.instructions: To make the basil & mustard yoghurt, bash the remaining basil leaves in a pestle and mortar with a pinch of sea salt. Peel and add the garlic and bash again.

on_enter.say: To make the basil & mustard yoghurt, bash the remaining basil leaves in a pestle and mortar with a pinch of sea salt. Peel and add the garlic and bash again.

steps.descr: Scrape the mixture into a bowl and add the mustard, 4...
steps.instructions: Scrape the mixture into a bowl and add the mustard, 4 tablespoons of Greek yoghurt and the remaining lemon juice. Add 1 tablespoon of extra virgin olive oil, mix well, season to taste and serve with the salmon traybake.

on_enter.say: Scrape the mixture into a bowl and add the mustard, 4 tablespoons of Greek yoghurt and the remaining lemon juice. Add 1 tablespoon of extra virgin olive oil, mix well, season to taste and serve with the salmon traybake.
